title: EL4 Modpack
description: A lightweight modpack designed for the EL SMP, offering performance boosts, quality-of-life features, and visual enhancements to improve your Minecraft experience.
body: The EL SMP Modpack is a lightweight and optimized collection built for Fabric 1.21, focused on smooth performance with core mods like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore. It includes helpful quality-of-life features such as AppleSkin, MiniHUD, Xaero’s Minimap, and ReplayMod to enhance usability without clutter. Builders benefit from tools like Litematica, Tweakeroo, and Mouse Tweaks, while Iris and WaveyCapes offer subtle visual upgrades. Multiplayer is seamless with built-in Voice Chat, AuthMe for access control, and various tweaks for better interaction. Config mods like Cloth Config, ModMenu, and YetAnotherConfigLib ensure customization is easy. With extras like EuphoriaPatcher, Do a Barrel Roll, and command enhancements, the experience stays fun and flexible. Everything is carefully selected to support both solo adventures and large-scale SMP gameplay. Despite the wide feature set, the pack remains efficient and fast on a range of hardware. It's clean, responsive, and ready to power your next Minecraft session.
